hypothesis: Augmenting the Thermo-Calc-based reward with calibrated uncertainty estimates (e.g., ensemble CALPHAD predictions) to create a risk-sensitive Direct Preference Optimization objective will reduce domain-critical token drift and out-of-distribution tendency in low-capacity LMs (such as OLMo) while preserving or improving validity, coverage, novelty, and mean reward across LLaMA-3.1, Gemma-2, and OLMo-2-7B.
